faqs.question: Do you have allergen information?
faqs.answer: Yes! Our menu items contain common allergens including gluten, soy, eggs, and shellfish. Please inform your server of any allergies when ordering. We have a full allergen chart available in-store.

faqs.question: Do you have vegan options?
faqs.answer: Yes! We offer a Vegan Shoyu Ramen and several vegan-friendly appetizers including Edamame. Please ask your server for our full vegan-friendly list.

faqs.question: Is there parking available?
faqs.answer: All three of our locations have free parking available in the shopping center lot.

faqs.question: Do you offer catering?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer catering for groups of 20+. Please contact us at least 3 days in advance. Email catering@bakudanramen.com for details.

faqs.question: Do you offer takeout or delivery?
faqs.answer: Yes! Takeout is available at all locations. We're also on DoorDash, Uber Eats, and Grubhub for delivery.

faqs.question: Do you sell gift cards?
faqs.answer: Yes! Gift cards are available in-store in any amount. They can be used at all Bakudan Ramen locations.

faqs.question: Do you have WiFi?
faqs.answer: Yes, free WiFi is available at all locations. Ask your server for the password.
